description: The full history of Foreign Portfolio Investor flows into India, synced locally and queryable offline — something neither NSDL nor CDSL offers today.

novel_features.name: Net-investment year-over-year comparison
novel_features.description: See this year's FPI net flow next to the same period last year, delta computed automatically.

novel_features.name: Sector rotation top movers
novel_features.description: Rank which sectors saw the biggest FPI inflow/outflow swing between the two most recent synced periods.

novel_features.name: Foreign investment limit utilization
novel_features.description: See what percentage of the regulatory FPI investment cap a sector or debt category has used.

novel_features.name: Buying/selling streak detection
novel_features.description: See how many consecutive fortnights/years FPIs have been net buyers or sellers, and the most recent flip.

novel_features.name: AUC historical trend
novel_features.description: Track how a country's or category's share of assets under custody has changed across synced snapshots.

novel_features.name: Historical extremes
novel_features.description: Find the largest single-period FPI inflows or outflows across the full 1992-93-to-present series.

novel_features.name: Net-investment trend
novel_features.description: See the rolling growth-rate and direction of FPI net flow over a window of recent periods.

novel_features.name: NSDL/CDSL discrepancy flagging
novel_features.description: Compare NSDL's and CDSL's figures for the same date and flag any mismatch.
